Language: typescript
Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adobe/react-spectrum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adobe/react-spectrum
Language: typescript
A collection of libraries and tools that help you build adaptive, accessible, and robust user experiences.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: janhq/jan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/janhq/jan
Language: typescript
Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 15 platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nanocoai/nanoclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nanocoai/nanoclaw
Language: typescript
A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nicobailon/pi-subagents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nicobailon/pi-subagents
Language: typescript
Pi extension for async subagent delegation with truncation, artifacts, and session sharing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: reconurge/flowsint
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/reconurge/flowsint
Language: typescript
A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supermemoryai/supermemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supermemoryai/supermemory
Language: typescript
Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
